titleStmt.title: SII 15.125: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 125. (B.K. No. 41 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a beam of the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
This is dated the 8th regnal year of the king, Jaya, Mārgaśira-amāvāsyā, Sunday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1174 A.D., November 26. The weekday, however, was Tuesday.

It commences with the praśasti of the one Thousand learned Mahājanas of Lokkiguṇḍi, which was a Mahāgrahāra said to have been endowed by the illustrious Rāma and registers the gift of an annual income of six paṇas made by Bācharasa, brother of Guṇanidhi Kēśavadēva, to the god Asitara Kēśavāditya, for burning a perpetual lamp.
Another gift to the same deity by Meṇḍeya Keṟeyanāyaka is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: 1) After this commences another inscription No. 132 below.

parākramarāśritajanakalpavrikṣarahitapakṣakṣayakara¨rkkaliyugagāṁgēya¨rpparamaparōpakāriga ḷāhavadhuraṁdhara¨rśāpānugrahasama¨rttha¨rkkā¨ryyabṛhaspatigaḷēkaykapaṁḍita¨rgrāmanāmō ttama¨rvvaiṣṇavagītimanōhara¨rppāpabhīrugaḷ
paranārīsahōdararu duṣṭavidhvaṁsaka¨rviśiṣṭajanāśraya¨rkāmakrōdhalōbhamōhaviva¨rjji ta¨rdvātriṁśatsahasrasamayā¨rgghyāruha dvijakuḷatiḷakaru śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara¨rssamasta guṇa viśēṣōṁnatarappa śrīrāmaradatti mahāgrahāra
śrīmalloṁkiguṁḍiyūroḍeya pramukha śrī sāsi¨rvvaru neredu dha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ surakṣita māgi rakṣisuttamire . mattaṁ śrī sāsi¨rvvaraputraṁ guṇanidhi kēśavadēvana mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe . vṛtta keḷegoṁḍaṁ kritakrityanōlagisidaṁ dhaṁnyaṁ diṭaṁ pakkadoḷu baḷedaṁ tāne kritā¨rtthēṣṭa nēṁ pūjyaṁ
po¨rddidaṁ sēbyanaggaḷadiṁ bēḍidavaṁ sada¨rtthanenipī sāma¨rtthyamaṁ dhātriyoḷu taḷedaṁ kēśava dēvano¨rvvane valaṁ saujaṁnya ratnākaraṁ yintu negaḷtevaḍeda guṇanidhi kēśavadēvana tamma bācarasaṁ taṁna taḷa bhōgada kēṇiyalu © svasti śrīmatu kaḷacu¨ryya bhujabaḷa cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāriThe letter va is engraved below the line.
sōvidēvava¨rṣada 8 neya jaya saṁvatsarada mā¨rggaśiradamāvāsya Ādityavāra sū¨ryya grahaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpātadaṁdu Asitara śrī kēśavādityadēvara naṁdādīvigagācaṁdrā ¨rkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi variṣaṁprati biṭṭa paṇa 6 Idanāro¨rvvaru
taḷabhōgada kēṇiya koṁḍa kēṇikāṟaru śrī sāsi¨rvvaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . mattamā puṇyadinadoḷu meṁḍeyakeṟeya nāyakaṁ taṁna taḷāṟikeyalu tanage naḍeva saṁte yāyadaha maṇada gaḍiyaraṁ bāviyumaṁ kēśavādityadēvarige biṭṭa .
Digital edition of SII 15.125 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
